raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 379 aims to prevent the state from secretly placing Sexually Violent Predators (SVPs) in communities without public safety considerations.",
    "The SAFE Act requires the Department of State Hospitals to ensure that their vendor, Liberty Healthcare, prioritizes public safety in the placement of SVPs.",
    "The SAFE Act mandates that the Department of State Hospitals approve any placements before Liberty Healthcare can sign leases for placement locations.",
    "Senator Jones argues that SVPs have committed crimes so severe that they should never be released from prison.",
    "The SAFE Act aims to require transparency in the SVP placement process and to prioritize public safety in decision-making.",
    "Senate Bill 380 implements a recommendation from the California State Auditor for the Department of State Hospitals to conduct a feasibility study on utilizing Transitional Housing facilities for SVPs with conditional release.",
    "This feasibility study recommendation follows an audit of the SVP program by the California State Auditor."
  ]
}
```
